description: Bottled in a delectable blue flask, Cool Waters for women from davidoff features floral, aquatic accords, true to its name. A light, clean fragrance that opens with notes of pineapple, melon and black currant and mellows down to heart notes of water lily, hawthorn, lily of the valley and jasmine. The dry-down has base notes of vetiver, sandal, peach and blackberry.Quantity: 50 mlCautionFlammableKeep away from sources of ignitionKeep away from childrenDo not use near fire, flame or heatAvoid spraying near the eyes
